stemHtml: Due to a mechanical failure, the flaps are only extended in one of the wings. What will happen?

options.a: The aircraft will roll to the side where the flaps are extended and yaw to the same direction of the roll.
options.b: The aircraft will roll to the side where the flaps are not extended and yaw to the direction of the wing with extended flaps.
options.c: The aircraft will roll and yaw to the side where the flaps are extended.
options.d: The aircraft will roll and yaw to the side where the flaps are not extended.
